title: Saph is Very Scary
description: Neeeeooommmmmm! Saph is very scary! Come join her in this horror-themed modpack!
body:
![Logo of Saph is Very Scary modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/900699bd934ef7271f6949792c7cd95787121958.png)

# Neeeommm! Saph is Very Scary! :O
Nah, she's not, but this modpack is!

This modpack features a variety of horror mods, such as The One Who Watches, Darkness (you ain't gonna see Watcher coming)

If you've got this pack installed on a server (see above) you can also use Simple Voice Chat to make the experience even more scary! Sneak up on your own friends! >:)

There's also some farming mods to make life more enjoyable while you're here, and there's even a FNAF mod! FNAF structures will spawn all over the world! Go explore, and instead of you hunting, you'll be hunted. 

Enjoy :3
& Get hunted!

## Wanting to run a server using these mods?
Please **do not use** the downloads from here on a server. I am not responsible for any crashes that may result from using these downloads here on a server.

Please use [this OneDrive link](https://1drv.ms/f/s!AjDTdhUHRLt7g7FD2U1YtupTAFEWmA?e=qIevOy) to download you desired version for your forge server.
